records.question: Which cities are exactly named Taizhou ( Zhejiang )?

records.question: Which cities where city is Shanghai have temperatures exactly 18.3 in March, exactly 19.4 in November, at least 20.6 in July and September, and at most 20.6 in August and at most 18.3 in December?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT city.city_id FROM city
JOIN temperature ON city.city_id = temperature.city_id
WHERE temperature.sep >= 20.6 AND temperature.jul >= 20.6 AND temperature.mar = 18.3 AND temperature.nov = 19.4 AND city.city = 'Shanghai' AND temperature.dec <= 18.3 AND temperature.aug <= 20.6
records.pred_sql:
SELECT city.City_ID
FROM city
INNER JOIN temperature ON city.City_ID = temperature.City_ID
WHERE city.City = 'Shanghai'
  AND temperature.Mar = 18.3
  AND temperature.Nov = 19.4
  AND temperature.Jul >= 20.6
  AND temperature.Sep >= 20.6
  AND temperature.Aug <= 20.6
  AND temperature.Dec <= 18.3
